message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor Administrator
participant "Main UI" as MainUI
participant "ImportReadingsFromFileUI" as ImportUI
participant "ImportReadingsFromFileController" as Controller
participant "ListOfGeographicArea" as GeoArea
participant "reader:XmlReader" as XmlReader

Administrator -> MainUI : Request file path
MainUI --> ImportUI : file path
ImportUI -> Controller : addReadingsToSensors(reader,path)
activate Controller
    Controller -> XmlReader : importReadingsOfSensor(path)
    activate XmlReader
    XmlReader --> Controller : listOfReadingsDto
    deactivate XmlReader
    
    Controller -> GeoArea : getAllSensors()
    activate GeoArea
    GeoArea --> Controller : listOfAreaSensors
    deactivate GeoArea
    
    Controller -> Controller : setReadingsBySensorIDescription()
    
    Controller --> ImportUI : number of lines added
deactivate Controller
ImportUI --> Administrator : number of lines added

@enduml
```
